creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

According to https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/licenses.html it should be LICENSE=

You should also specify LICENSE_FILE= which in this case seems to be COPYRIGHT as far as I can tell.
https://git.postgresql.org/gitweb/?p=slony1-engine.git;a=blob;f=COPYRIGHT;h=df7538529c1e509e8aade82ee5f64b1a85c799fd;hb=HEAD

Please also be consistent with upper and lower case
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/databases/postgresql12-server/Makefile?revision=544810&view=markup#l16
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/licenses.html

Best regards,
Daniel
